value_signal: Current Outlier opportunity pages show U.S.-remote content review work paying up to $16 USD/hour with selective screening.
eligibility_or_region_notes: The live opportunity is U.S.-remote and depends on truthful screening fit for content review or related review work.
deadline_or_currentness: Current public opportunity page is live; the work is screening-gated and can convert near-term if the profile matches.
evidence_gate: Approved account plus completed task and verified payout or usable value.
ai_can_do_next: Draft a truthful content-review readiness checklist and a short fit note for the user to review.
human_must_do_next: Human account owner must create the account, complete screening, and accept a task.
automation_boundary: No account creation, login, screening submission, or private profile/payment data handling.
why_this_is_not_income_yet: Open access is not income until an assignment is completed and payout is verified.
risk_flags: Selectivity and role fit still matter; do not route without a truthful content-review profile.
known_blockers: Requires truthful screening fit and approval on the platform.

income_gate.rule: Counts only after approved account or visible usable payout delivery.
